PowerShell($h = Get-Content c:\\dev\\demoConnect\\index.html -Raw; @{ "CDN Google Fonts absent" = \($h -notmatch "fonts\\.googleapis\\.com"\); "Logo data URI present" = \($h -match "data:image/png;base64"\); "Fonts embarquees" = \($h -match "@font-face"\); "Art-layout present" = \($h -match "art-layout"\) } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($h = Get-Content c:\\dev\\demoConnect\\index.html -Raw; $count = \([regex]::Matches\($h, "data:image/png;base64"\)\).Count; Write-Output "index.html: $count occurrence\(s\) du logo base64"; $e = Get-Content c:\\dev\\demoConnect\\engine.js -Raw; $count2 = \([regex]::Matches\($e, "data:image/png;base64"\)\).Count; Write-Output "engine.js: $count2 occurrence\(s\) du logo base64")

PowerShell($h = Get-Content c:\\dev\\demoConnect\\index.html -Raw; $e = Get-Content c:\\dev\\demoConnect\\engine.js -Raw; @{ "engine.js logo = chemin local" = \($e -match 'LOGO_URL="Image/logo_demo\\.png"'\); "index.html logo = data URI" = \($h -match "data:image/png;base64"\); "index.html CDN absent" = \($h -notmatch "fonts\\.googleapis\\.com"\) } | Format-Table -AutoSize)
